SIMPLE PROCESS
We don't move bags. We complete journeys.
We don't move bags. We complete journeys.
We don't move bags. We complete journeys.
We don't move bags. We complete journeys.
We don't move bags. We complete journeys.
We don't move bags. We complete journeys.

This isn't luggage storage. This isn't a locker. This is door-to-gate delivery — and gate-to-door delivery — handled by real people, tracked in real time, sealed before it leaves your hands.

1
Book in under 3 minutes
Tell us your address, your airport, and how many bags. That's it. No app required. We work around your schedule, not the other way around.
2
We come to you
A verified reclaim agent arrives at your hotel, Airbnb, home, or office at the time you chose. They check your ID, confirm your boarding pass, seal every bag with a tamper-evident tag, and check everything into our system. Your bags are now officially in motion — without you.
3
Your bags travel. You explore.
While your luggage makes its way to the airport — or from the airport to your hotel — you're free. First meal. Last walk. First look at the city. We'll take it from here.
4
Bags where you need them. Before you need them.
For departures: your bags are at the terminal when you arrive. For arrivals: your bags are at your hotel — or waiting for you the moment your room is ready. No counter. No queue. No waiting.
5
Track everything, worry about nothing.
Real-time updates via app, SMS, or email at every stage. Collected. In transit. Delivered. Your bags have their own journey. You're just living yours.
What Travelers Are
Actually Saying

'reclaim completely changed how I travel. I dropped my bags at the hotel and went straight to security. No lines, no stress.'

Sarah M., Business Traveler

'I didn't realize how much time I was wasting in baggage lines until I used this service.'

Daniel R., Consultant

'Perfect for early flights. My bags were already checked in while I was still having breakfast.'

Laura K., Frequent Flyer

'reclaim completely changed how I travel. I dropped my bags at the hotel and went straight to security. No lines, no stress.'

'reclaim completely changed how I travel. I dropped my bags at the hotel and went straight to security. No lines, no stress.'

'I didn't realize how much time I was wasting in baggage lines until I used this service.'

Daniel R., Consultant

'Perfect for early flights. My bags were already checked in while I was still having breakfast.'

Laura K., Frequent Flyer

'This service makes airport travel feel effortless.'

Michael T., Startup Founder

'I was skeptical at first, but it worked perfectly. My luggage arrived exactly as promised.'

Anna L., Product Manager

'The best travel convenience I've used in years.'

'This service makes airport travel feel effortless.'

Michael T., Startup Founder

Anna L., Product Manager

'The best travel convenience I've used in years.'

James W., Digital Nomad
YOUR LUGGAGE, INSURED & TRACKED
Enterprise-Grade Security for Every Journey

At reclaim, we don't just move bags — we protect your peace of mind. Every booking includes our standard protection plan, ensuring your belongings are handled with the highest level of care and security.

Up to $2,500 Coverage

Every bag is backed by our comprehensive protection policy against loss or damage.

SITA WorldTracer Integration

We use the same global tracking technology as the world's leading airlines to monitor your bag's location in real-time.

TSA-Certified Handling

Our team follows strict federal guidelines, ensuring a seamless hand-off to airport security.

CHAIN OF CUSTODY
Your Bag's Journey,
Every Step
STEP 1
Secure Pickup

Photo-verified hand-off at your hotel.

STEP 2
Sealed Transit

Bags are transported in GPS-monitored, locked vehicles.

STEP 3
Airport Hand-off

Digital signature and timestamp at the airport terminal.

STEP 4
Ready for reclaim

Real-time notification sent to your phone the moment your bag is processed.

FAQ'S
Questions travelers actually ask.

And the honest answers.

What exactly is reclaim and how does it work?
Can reclaim deliver my bags to the hotel when I arrive — not just pick up when I leave?
My hotel check-in isn't until 3pm but I land at 9am. What should I do?
I check out at 11am but my flight isn't until 7pm. What are my real options?
Is reclaim safe? How do you protect my bags?
How much does reclaim cost — and is it worth it?
Can I book reclaim for both my arrival and my departure on the same trip?
Where does reclaim pick up and deliver?
Is reclaim available for major sporting events and international tournaments?
What if something goes wrong with my bags?
Contact our support team

Have more questions?

Contact our support team with any questions you might have.

Contact Us
Ready to travel light?

Let reclaim handle your luggage so you can focus on the journey.

Book Your reclaim

Transforming air travel with remote luggage check-in services. Skip the lines, save time, travel light.

Official SITA Partner · TSA-Compliant · First in North America

TRUST IS KEY
reclaim doesn't just serve travelers. It serves the entire journey.

reclaim doesn't just serve travelers. It serves the entire journey.
reclaim doesn't just serve travelers. It serves the entire journey.
reclaim doesn't just serve travelers. It serves the entire journey.

Every hotel, airport, airline, and travel brand that touches a passenger also touches the luggage problem. reclaim is how you solve it — for your guests, your passengers, and your bottom line.

Hotels
Your guest will forget the thread count. They won't forget standing in your lobby for six hours with nowhere to put their bags. reclaim fixes both ends of that experience — and pays you for it.
Become a hotel partner
Airports & Airlines
The passenger who checked their bags before leaving the hotel isn't rushing to your counter. They're at your bar, your restaurant, your lounge. reclaim turns dead time into dwell time — and shares the revenue with you.
Explore airline & airport partnerships
Credit Cards, Loyalty & Insurance
Our cardholders don't want another lounge. They want their first and last hours back. Lounge access. Travel credits. Concierge services. Your cardholders have seen every benefit. reclaim is the one they'll actually feel — every single trip, at both ends of the journey, at the exact moment that matters most. Add reclaim as a cardholder benefit, a loyalty redemption option, or a travel insurance enhancement. We make your program tangible at the moments your customer is most grateful for it.
Explore brand partnerships
Trusted by Leading Airlines

We partner with major airlines and airports to provide a seamless door-to-plane luggage experience you can count on.

title: reclaim — Luggage Pickup & Airport Delivery | Atlanta · Miami
text:
Home
Price
How it Works
Partners
About
Blog
Login
Book Now
About reclaim

We pick up your bags from your hotel, home, or Airbnb and take them to the airport, where we check them in with your airline. You skip the check-in line and go straight to your gate.

Redefining the 'Last Day' Experience.

We believe your trip shouldn't end at hotel check-out. reclaim was born in Atlanta to bridge the gap between your final morning and your evening flight, giving you back the hours usually lost to luggage logistics.

BORN IN ATLANTA
4,500+
Hours Reclaimed

That's the total time our travelers have spent exploring, dining, and relaxing in Atlanta — completely unburdened.

SITA Integrated

We utilize WorldTracer technology, the global standard for baggage tracking used by 90% of the world's airlines.

TSA Compliant

Secure, certified handling from the hotel lobby to the terminal. Your peace of mind is our priority.

Starting in ATL. Scaling Everywhere.

We are currently exclusive to the Atlanta market, partnering with the city's most iconic hotels to perfect the art of the 'Hands-Free' journey before we take flight globally.

The Team

Logistics experts, tech innovators, and travel lovers.

Tell Us What
You Think

We'd love to hear from you — share your thoughts, feedback, or questions.

Send Message

Transforming air travel with remote luggage check-in services. Skip the lines, save time, travel light.

Official SITA Partner · TSA-Compliant · First in North America

How reclaim Works

Four steps between you and a luggage-free trip. Book online, hand off your bags, and walk to your gate empty-handed.

Your bags never leave our sight.

Tamper-sealed, insured, and tracked in real time. Every step — from your door to check-in.

We come to you.

Tell us where and when. Your bags are sealed and on their way. Your morning stays yours.

Checked in before you arrive.

Where available, we deliver to your airline counter or straight to you at the terminal. Done before you've left the hotel.

Walk straight to your gate.

Where available — no counter, no queue, no waiting. Just you and the airport, the way it should feel.

Three Steps to a
Luggage-Free Trip

No lines. No bag drop. No hauling suitcases through the terminal. Just book, hand off, and go.

Book
Drop
Explore
Built For Every
Traveler

Families, business travelers, solo adventurers — anyone who'd rather not drag bags through an airport.

Solo Traveler

Skip the bag drop and head straight to your gate.

Families

Wrangle kids, not suitcases. We handle the bags.

Business Traveler

Land and go straight to your meeting. No baggage claim wait.

Event Attendees

Headed to a conference or game? Arrive hands-free.

Airbnb / Rental Guests

Check out of your rental and hand off your bags on the spot.

Travel Agents

Offer your clients a premium, luggage-free experience.

Sports & Gear

Oversize equipment picked up and checked in for you.

Parents with Young Kids

One less thing to carry. Focus on your family.

Honeymooners

Start your trip relaxed. No airport baggage hassle.

Digital Nomads

Move between cities without dragging bags through transit.

From Your Door to Your Gate

Here's exactly what happens after you book. Four steps, zero airport lines.

Book in Seconds
Secure Pickup
Live Tracking
Airline Check-in

You only lose the worry
You only lose the worry

You only lose the worry

Every airport trip costs you time, money, and energy you shouldn't have to spend.

Overweight fees, storage lockers, extra taxis — the real price of hauling luggage through an airport is higher than you think.

Storage Fees
+$45

of travelers have no idea where their bag is after check-in.

Too Many Hands

Major Airlines

text:

Travel Tips
Why Smart Travelers Never Touch Their Luggage Anymore
Mar 4, 2026
5 min read

Air travel is stressful enough. Carrying heavy luggage through crowded terminals only adds to the burden. Discover the new way smart travelers are reclaiming their freedom.

The modern traveler has evolved. Gone are the days of wrestling oversized suitcases through crowded airport terminals, waiting anxiously at baggage carousels, and worrying about lost luggage. A new paradigm has emerged — and it's changing the way we think about travel forever.

Imagine stepping off your plane with nothing but your phone and passport. Your luggage? Already waiting for you at your hotel, delivered securely and tracked every step of the way. This isn't a luxury reserved for the ultra-wealthy anymore — it's becoming the standard for smart travelers everywhere.

The concept is simple: why carry what can be carried for you? Services like reclaim have pioneered a seamless luggage transfer system that picks up your bags from your hotel, transports them securely to the airport, and handles all the heavy lifting — literally.

But it's not just about convenience. There's a growing body of research showing that the physical and mental burden of managing luggage significantly impacts travel satisfaction. Studies show that travelers who arrive at their destination luggage-free report 40% higher satisfaction rates.

The technology behind it is equally impressive. Real-time GPS tracking, tamper-evident seals, chain-of-custody documentation, and $2,500 in standard protection coverage mean your belongings are safer than they've ever been — even safer than when they're in your own hands.

Early adopters include business travelers who need to maximize productivity, families tired of juggling kids and bags, and luxury travelers who simply refuse to compromise on their experience. But increasingly, everyday travelers are discovering the freedom of going luggage-free.

Business
The Ultimate Guide to Stress-Free Business Travel
Feb 22, 2026
4 min read

Maximize your productivity and minimize hassle on your next business trip with these essential tips from frequent flyers.

Business travel doesn't have to be a source of stress. With the right strategies and tools, you can transform your trips from exhausting obligations into productive, even enjoyable experiences.

The first rule of stress-free business travel: minimize what you carry. Every bag you bring is a decision you have to manage, a weight you have to bear, and a potential point of failure. Smart business travelers are increasingly using luggage transfer services to arrive at meetings fresh and focused.

Technology is your best friend on the road. From mobile boarding passes to real-time flight tracking apps, the modern business traveler has an arsenal of tools that previous generations could only dream of. The key is building a consistent workflow that you can rely on trip after trip.

Hotel selection matters more than you think. Proximity to your meetings, reliable Wi-Fi, a good workspace, and quality sleep can make or break a business trip. Many frequent travelers maintain a list of tried-and-tested hotels in their most-visited cities.

Finally, don't underestimate the power of routine. Maintaining your exercise schedule, eating well, and getting enough sleep while traveling isn't just good for your health — it's good for your business performance.

Travel Tips
How to Pack Like a Pro for a Two-Week Trip
Feb 10, 2026
6 min read

Master the art of packing with our comprehensive guide to fitting everything you need — without the overweight fees.

Packing for a two-week trip doesn't have to mean bringing your entire wardrobe. With a strategic approach, you can fit everything you need into a single carry-on — or better yet, let reclaim handle it all for you.

The capsule wardrobe approach is your secret weapon. Choose a color palette of 3-4 complementary colors and select pieces that can be mixed and matched. A well-planned capsule wardrobe of 12-15 pieces can create over 50 unique outfits.

Rolling vs. folding: the eternal debate. The truth is, both have their place. Roll casual items like t-shirts and jeans to save space, and fold structured items like blazers and dress shirts to prevent wrinkles. Packing cubes are the great equalizer — they work with both methods.

Toiletries are where most people over-pack. Invest in quality travel-sized containers, and remember that most hotels provide basic toiletries. For longer trips, plan to do laundry midway — it's cheaper than paying overweight baggage fees.

The golden rule: lay out everything you think you need, then remove a third of it. You'll be surprised how little you actually need when you're on the road. And with services like reclaim, even what you do bring doesn't have to weigh you down.

Destinations
Top 10 Destinations Where Luggage-Free Travel Shines
Jan 28, 2026
7 min read

From Tokyo to Barcelona, these destinations are best explored hands-free. See how reclaim makes it effortless.

Some destinations are simply better without luggage. Whether it's navigating Tokyo's efficient but crowded train system, wandering the narrow streets of Barcelona's Gothic Quarter, or island-hopping in Greece, going hands-free transforms the experience.

Tokyo tops our list for good reason. The city's incredible public transit system is a marvel of efficiency, but navigating it with large luggage can be a nightmare. Stairs, crowds, and strict etiquette around luggage space make a strong case for traveling light.

Barcelona's charm lies in its walkability — from the Ramblas to Park Güell, the city rewards those who explore on foot. Dragging a suitcase over cobblestones? Not exactly the Mediterranean dream.

The Greek Islands present a unique challenge: ferry transfers between islands, steep hillside villages, and tiny boutique hotels with no elevators. Luggage-free travel here isn't just convenient — it's practically essential.

Other destinations on our list include Lisbon (hills!), Amsterdam (cycling culture), Kyoto (temple-hopping), Santorini (those famous stairs), Dubrovnik (medieval walls), Marrakech (medina navigation), and New York City (subway adventures).

The common thread? These are all destinations where mobility equals freedom. The less you carry, the more you experience.

Travel Tips
Airport Hacks Every Traveler Should Know in 2026
Jan 15, 2026
5 min read

Skip the lines, dodge the fees, and breeze through security with these insider tips for the modern traveler.

Airports in 2026 are more advanced than ever, but they can still be overwhelming. Here are the insider tips that frequent flyers swear by to make every airport experience smoother.

Biometric screening is now available at most major airports. Enroll in programs like TSA PreCheck, Global Entry, or CLEAR to skip the longest lines. The initial investment pays for itself after just 2-3 trips.

Timing is everything. Tuesday and Wednesday are consistently the least crowded days to fly. Early morning flights (before 8 AM) tend to have fewer delays, and arriving at the airport exactly 2 hours before domestic flights hits the sweet spot between stress and wasted time.

Airport lounges have become more accessible than ever. Many credit cards now include lounge access, and day passes are available at most Priority Pass lounges for around $30-50. The free food, drinks, and Wi-Fi easily offset the cost.

The ultimate airport hack? Don't bring luggage at all. Services like reclaim handle your bags door-to-door, meaning you can walk through the airport with nothing but your essentials. No check-in lines, no baggage carousel wait, no carousel anxiety.

Industry
The Future of Hotel Check-In: No Lines, No Luggage
Jan 2, 2026
4 min read

Hotels are evolving. Learn how luggage-free check-in is transforming the guest experience from arrival to departure.

The hotel industry is undergoing a quiet revolution. The traditional check-in experience — waiting in line, handing over your ID, getting a key card, and then lugging your bags to your room — is being reimagined from the ground up.

Mobile check-in has become the norm at major hotel chains. Guests can now check in via their phone, receive a digital room key, and go straight to their room upon arrival. But the next frontier goes even further: luggage-free arrivals.

Forward-thinking hotels are partnering with luggage transfer services to offer a truly seamless experience. Imagine: your bags are picked up from your previous location and delivered directly to your room before you even arrive. You walk in, and everything is waiting for you.

This isn't just a convenience play — it's a fundamental shift in how hotels think about the guest experience. By removing the friction of luggage, hotels are freeing guests to enjoy the property from the moment they arrive.

The data supports the trend. Hotels offering luggage-free check-in report higher guest satisfaction scores, increased loyalty program engagement, and — perhaps most importantly — guests who spend more time (and money) at hotel amenities instead of managing their belongings.
